title: Slide_In gradient PAINT-STROKE emitter (L5 LEAD)
goal: Slide_In 12.11 dB -> target >=12. LEAD for the gradient-generator subsystem. Census (Rule 7): the Slide_In gradient is a PAINT-STROKE emitter (NOT a fill) + rounded-rect mask + Motion Path (3 missing subsystems). Rule 8: fct census to CONFIRM the gradient TYPE before writing a generator (prior premise was wrong). DoD: >=12, gate net-positive.
